{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Chaos Fields
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Gold]] acolytes use [[Chaos Fields]] made of yellow balls filled with storms of razor-sharp stones and crushing [[earth aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
